2021-22 Loyola Marymount Lions Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 11-18 (3-12, 9th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Stan Johnson

PS/G: 69.3 (225th of 358)

PA/G: 74.1 (299th of 358)

SRS: -1.93 (185th of 358)

SOS: 3.25 (107th of 358)

ORtg: 101.8 (202nd of 358)

DRtg: 108.8 (335th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000
